description.line01: Software developer with adaptability and a proactive approach to learning new technologies, capable of integrating into and adding value to multidisciplinary teams.
description.line02: Currently seeking opportunities to apply my skills in the research and development of innovative solutions, actively contributing to the creation and improvement of systems.

project1.title: User Management System
project1.descriptionComplete: A user management application featuring a complete CRUD system, allowing creation, editing, listing, and deletion of users in a simple and intuitive interface.

project2.title: Game Discovery Platform
project2.descriptionComplete: A web application built to practice React and Redux concepts, integrating with the free FreeToGame API and Firebase to fetch, manage, and display game data dynamically.

project3.title: NGO Case Sharing Platform
project3.descriptionComplete: A platform designed to showcase real cases and facilitate communication between NGOs and potential donors, helping connect causes with people willing to support them.

project4.title: Dashboard to monitor factory
project4.descriptionComplete: A real-time industrial monitoring dashboard that simulates a shopfloor environment with machines and production orders.

project5.title: Personal Agenda
project5.descriptionComplete: A platform designed for managing daily activities, where it is possible to create tasks, view them weekly, and filter by category and completion status.

responsibilities: Studied Vue technology for use in the project.
Assisted in the development of components for a test automation application used in a factory environment.
Collaborated in the development of a test automation application for a factory environment.
Used essential tools such as Nuxt.js, Vuetify, Vuex and Git.
Participated in a team focused on automating a physical process in a factory environment.
Collaborated in the development of an automation application.
Used technologies such as .NET, WPF and Flutter.

screen.title: Get In Touch
screen.description: I'm currently open to new opportunities and interesting projects. Whether you have a question, want to collaborate, or just want to say hi. I'll try my best to get back to you!
